rounds: Two weeks of solid routine — that's actually a win, the groove is real. But the Apollo ring moment? They got that one. A colleague opened a door and you closed it. The half-naked man on your finger literally started the conversation for you and you still said no thanks.
pattern: They're fine with the costume, terrified of the explanation.
focus: One stranger gets the ring story — even a short version, even a deflection that doesn't fully close the door.
